516 O0400B1_OT_INDVDL_MIN_NUM O0400B1_OT_INDVDL_MIN_NUM O0400B1 Occupational Therapy Individual Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that occupational therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
